message:
fix(command): wire MOVE command to store and implement shared-namespace semantics

Pass store and now_ms to move_cmd so it can check key existence.
Add DB index range validation (0..16). In the single-namespace
runtime model all DBs share one store, so MOVE returns 0 in both
cases (key exists = "already in target DB", key missing = nothing
to move) rather than the previous stub that only handled db==0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
